'''shashuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oosporangium|oosporangium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-sh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oosporangium|oosporangium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shashuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæshithith|shæshithith]] || [[word:shæshithij|shæshithij]] || [[word:shæshithish|shæshithish]] || [[word:shæshithi|shæshithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shashushuthuth|shashushuthuth]] || [[word:shashushuthuj|shashushuthuj]] || [[word:shashushuthush|shashushuthush]] || [[word:shashushuthu|shashushuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shashuthuth|shashuthuth]] || [[word:shashuthuj|shashuthuj]] || [[word:shashuthush|shashuthush]] || [[word:shashuthu|shashuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shashufthuth|shashufthuth]] || [[word:shashufthuj|shashufthuj]] || [[word:shashufthush|shashufthush]] || [[word:shashufthuf|shashufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shashuthuthu|shashuthuthu]] || [[word:shashuthuju|shashuthuju]] || [[word:shashuthushu|shashuthushu]] || [[word:shashuthuku|shashuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shashuthuth|shashuthuth]] || [[word:shashuthuj|shashuthuj]] || [[word:shashuthush|shashuthush]] || [[word:shashuthu|shashuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shashuthuthul|shashuthuthul]] || [[word:shashuthujul|shashuthujul]] || [[word:shashuthushul|shashuthushul]] || [[word:shashuthukul|shashuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shashuthuthuthu|shashuthuthuthu]] || [[word:shashuthujuju|shashuthujuju]] || [[word:shashuthushushu|shashuthushushu]] || [[word:shashuthuku|shashuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shashuthuthun|shashuthuthun]] || [[word:shashuthujun|shashuthujun]] || [[word:shashuthushun|shashuthushun]] || [[word:shashuthukun|shashuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shashuthuthuoro|shashuthuthuoro]] || [[word:shashuthujuoro|shashuthujuoro]] || [[word:shashuthushuoro|shashuthushuoro]] || [[word:shashuthukuoro|shashuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
